title: SEA Definition & Meaning - Merriam-Webster
snippet: The meaning of SEA is a great body of salt water that covers much of the earth; broadly : the waters of the earth as distinguished from the land and air. How to use sea in a sentence.

title: What's the difference between an ocean and a sea?
snippet: Jun 16, 2024 · A sea is generally smaller than an ocean. In fact, a sea is usually part of a larger ocean that is partially enclosed by land. Examples are the Red Sea and Mediterranean Sea.

title: What is the Difference Between a Sea and an Ocean?
snippet: Aug 12, 2024 · By definition, a sea is a smaller part of an ocean and is typically partially contained by an area of land. Almost all seas are found in areas where the ocean and land meet.
